forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 2da44e
+description: 'Implement `expect` — human-authored expectations as agent-run behavior tests. Op-dispatched MCP tool (noun-first CLI like kanban) + `*.expect.md` file format + drift ledger. Three verbs: observe (authoritative capture), evaluate (pure (observation,criteria)→verdict via tiered ladder), approve (promote observation→golden). Engine in new `swissarmyhammer-expect` crate; MCP shim in swissarmyhammer-tools; reuses review''s ACP machinery (AgentPool, run_review_over_agent, extract_json_value) and detected-projects/doctor/init frameworks. Basis: ideas/expect.md.'
+name: expect
